type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment: A knelson concentrator was added to the mill process which directed elemental mercury to the mercury retort in the gold refinery.  The mercury was colleced from the mercury retort unit which is a pollution prevention system.

type.fr: Commentaire sur le recyclage

comments.comment: The site will probably send the mercury offsite under a recyclable material in future.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Mercury was sent off site using a waste manifest, therefore the mercury has been recorded as disposed, however, the receiver of the mercury is actually recycling the material.

comments.comment:
Manganese is being reported as a result of the grinding media containing ì
managnese in a concentration of 1.2%.  Manganese is not monitored in the ì
treated effluent therefore no discharge amounts are provided.

substance.en: Nitrate ion in solution at pH >= 6.0
substance.fr: Nitrate (ion en sol. à un pH de >= 6.0)

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:
Nitric acid is used in the milling process to strip the carbon. The acid ì
is neutralized prior to leaving the mill, therefore no releases were ì
reported.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:
Manganese is being reported as a result of the grinding media containing ì
manganese is a concentration of 1.2%.  Manganese is not normally monitoredì
in the treated effluent therefore no discharge amounts are provided.

substance.en: Nitrate ion in solution at pH >= 6.0
substance.fr: Nitrate (ion en sol. à un pH de >= 6.0)

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:
Reduced volume of water discharged in 1997 as compared to 1996 therefore ì
reduced loadings.  However initial reporting of 34 tonnes for 1997 releases ì
was for nitrate as NO3-N.  The correct nitrate loadings as nitrate ion is ì
164 tonnes for 1997.

type.fr: Commentaire sur le statut de déclaration de la substance

comments.comment: Nitric acid is used for during strips/Acid washes. Spent acid (acid is consumed or diluted be on any use) and therefore any emissions are to be considered negligible.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: “Nitric acid is used for during strips/Acid washes”, the acid is consumed in process

type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment:
The site used/consumed 216.64 tonnes of nitric acid in 2021 within the process. 
Nitric acid is used for during strips/Acid washes. Spent acid (acid is consumed or diluted be on any use) and therefore any emissions are to be considered negligible
